summary: Worked extensively on a SaaS crypto algorithmic trading platform, completing a major .NET rewrite and infrastructure setup. Added advanced features like proxy infrastructure, strategy templates, and service-account authentication.

items.title: Crypto trading platform rewrite and deployment
items.description: Worked on the SaaS crypto algo trading platform, focusing on the .NET rewrite, deployment pipeline, and service-account auth.

items.title: Minimal AutoHotKey alternative
items.description: Started a minimal C++ automation tool with interception support and typed actions.

items.title: Firmware development for ESP32-S3 HID device
items.description: Iterated on feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware, adding new device variants and fire-and-forget emitting.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built a KMDF input filter and injection driver with a testing framework and library enhancements.

items.title: File tagging tool for Windows Explorer
items.description: Maintained the C++ file and folder tagging utility, fixing encoding issues and improving metadata handling.

items.title: Android text-to-speech engine
items.description: Developed a multi-engine TTS app with pitch control, RuNorm text normalization, and Vosk-based voice input.

items.title: Crypto trading platform feature rollout
items.description: Continued building the automated trading platform, adding proxy infrastructure, strategy templates, and billing overhaul.

items.title: New firmware variant for ESP32-S3
items.description: Drafted a new firmware variant for the HID device and fixed connectivity issues.

items.title: CI/CD for file tagging tool
items.description: Set up release automation for the Windows Explorer file-tagging utility.

items.title: Computer vision and automation tool
items.description: Enhanced a computer vision utility with YOLO model improvements and bow/flick assist features.

items.title: Crypto price prediction model research
items.description: Experimented with neural network architectures for crypto price prediction, including mixture of experts and ensemble models.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant for Android
items.description: Built a mobile AI assistant with sub-agent delegation, model presets, and local inference capabilities.

items.title: HID firmware hardware variants
items.description: Developed firmware updates for multiple ESP32 variants, including USB and dual-core versions.

items.title: Automation tool with overlay and YOLO
items.description: Added mode persistence, YOLO confidence control, and status display to the automation utility.

items.title: Microsoft Store publishing and CLI
items.description: Automated store publishing and added CLI features to the file tagging utility.

items.title: Code knowledge graph engine
items.description: Expanded a code intelligence tool with LSP integration, DI detection, and broader language support.

items.title: Online poker CV research tool
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for poker table state recognition and hand history reconstruction.

items.title: Telegram trading bot multi-instance tool
items.description: Built a C# web application for managing multiple Freqtrade bots with Telegram authentication and daily profit tracking.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding assistant
items.description: Developed an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool with worktree management and squash merging.
